queries.sql: SELECT "defence_team_width_class" FROM "team_attributes" WHERE "team_long_name" NOT IN ('Ajax', 'UD Almería');

queries.question: List team short name from team records optionally linked to team_attributes where team team short name is not null.

queries.question: List birthday from player records optionally linked to player_attributes where player height is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "player"."birthday" FROM "player" LEFT JOIN "player_attributes" ON "player"."player_name" = "player_attributes"."player_name" WHERE "player"."height" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List birthday from player records optionally linked to player_attributes where player weight is not null.

queries.question: List defence team width class from team_attributes records optionally linked to team where team_attributes date is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "team_attributes"."defence_team_width_class" FROM "team_attributes" LEFT JOIN "team" ON "team_attributes"."team_long_name" = "team"."team_long_name" WHERE "team_attributes"."date" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List player name from player records full-joined with player_attributes, team_attributes, team, league using a row-id selector.
List player name and birthday from player records full-joined with player_attributes, team_attributes, team, league using a row-id selector.
List player name from player records full-joined with player_attributes, team_attributes, team, league.
queries.sql: SELECT "player"."player_name" FROM "player" FULL OUTER JOIN "player_attributes" ON "player"."player_name" = "player_attributes"."player_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "team_attributes" ON "player_attributes"."date" = "team_attributes"."date" FULL OUTER JOIN "team" ON "team_attributes"."team_long_name" = "team"."team_long_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "league" ON "player"."country_name" = "league"."country_name";

queries.question: List player name and birthday from player records full-joined with player_attributes, team_attributes, team, league.
queries.sql: SELECT "player"."player_name", "player"."birthday" FROM "player" FULL OUTER JOIN "player_attributes" ON "player"."player_name" = "player_attributes"."player_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "team_attributes" ON "player_attributes"."date" = "team_attributes"."date" FULL OUTER JOIN "team" ON "team_attributes"."team_long_name" = "team"."team_long_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "league" ON "player"."country_name" = "league"."country_name";
